title: felicia puberula
intro: Felicia puberula, also known as the hairy felicia or felicia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to South Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Felicia puberula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Felicia puberula can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by drying and processing the plant into a powder or capsule for later use.
